weeks.title: Introduction to Linear Models & Optimization
weeks.summary: Master the basics of linear regression and the fundamental gradient descent optimizer.
weeks.learning_style_adapted: Hands-on projects implementing gradient descent from scratch.

weeks.title: Classification and Decision Trees
weeks.summary: Understand decision boundaries, logistic regression, entropy, and information gain metrics.
weeks.learning_style_adapted: Hands-on classification labs with scikit-learn decision trees.

weeks.title: Deep Neural Networks Foundations
weeks.summary: Explore neural networks, backpropagation algorithms, and common activation functions.
weeks.learning_style_adapted: Hands-on backpropagation exercises and simple multi-layer perceptrons.
